title: Here's Why Molson Coors (TAP) is Marching Ahead of Its Industry
text: Although rising inflation is concerning, brand strength, product innovation and a revitalization plan bode well for Molson Coors (TAP).

title: Bud Light boycott has been good for Molson Coors, but gains aren't set in stone, analysts say
text: As Bud Light sales drop amid a conservative-led boycott, beer drinkers have flocked to rival Molson Coors Beverage Co. for light-beer alternatives. But as the retreat from Bud reshapes the beer market, Wells Fargo analysts say investors have failed to ask a key question: What if Molson's gains go away?

title: Bud Light's Pain Has Been Molson Coors' Gain. What Happens Next.
text: Molson Coors has gained market share at the expense of Bud Light brewer AB InBev but investors shouldn't bet on further gains, Wells Fargo analysts say.

title: Molson Benefits in Brewing Beer Culture Wars
text: Analysts at Citigroup lifted their stock price target on the brewer of Coors.

title: Analysts Are Raising Price Targets on These 3 Large Caps
text: On pace for its first four-month winning streak since 2021, the S&P 500 is hovering near a 52-week high as fear-of-missing-out (FOMO) trading returns. In recent days, Wall Street analysts have felt FOMO as well, boosting their price targets to reflect reduced recession probabilities and improved investor sentiment.

title: With Inflation Falling, 5 Red-Hot Dividend Blue Chips May Be the New Top Picks Now
text: Well, it only took a little over a year, and a massive increase in the federal funds rate, but the inflation that has dogged the American consumer since early 2021 is finally subsiding.

title: Bud Light dethroned as top-selling beer by Modelo, as boycott cuts into sales
text: Bud Light has been dethroned by Modelo Especial as the best-selling beer in the U.S., according to a report, following a boycott of Bud Light that began in April in response to its partnership with trans influencer Dylan Mulvaney.

title: Bud Light Controversy Buoys Molson Coors Stock To Nearly 4.5-Year High—Analysts Predict Another 14% Surge
text: Bank of America upgraded the Coors Light and Miller Light parent this week thanks to spiking sales as consumers ditch Bud Light.

title: Molson Coors' (TAP) Innovation & Premiumization Efforts to Aid
text: Molson Coors' (TAP) efforts to invest in iconic brands and growth opportunities in the above-premium beer space are key growth drivers. It is on track with its revitalization plan.

title: 3 Top-Ranked Stocks with Bullish Catalysts
text: One way to enhance investing returns is to pick stocks that have multiple bullish factors aligning for them.

title: Best Value Stocks to Buy for June 7th
text: DHC, VCISY and TAP made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) value stocks list on June 7, 2023.

title: Best Income Stocks to Buy for June 7th
text: VWAGY, TAP and GSL made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) income stocks list on June 7, 2023.

title: Bud Light boycott is helping one of the beer's main rivals, analysts say
text: The boycott of Bud Light over its partnership with a trans influencer has endured long enough to help one of its parent company's main rivals, Molson Coors Beverage Co., analysts at BofA said on Tuesday.

title: Boycotts hit stocks hard. Here's what might be next for Bud, Target and others caught in the anti-Pride backlash
text: While it's too early to say how damaging boycott threats will be, damage has been done to the stocks of companies drawn into the latest culture war battle.
